title: Building a real-time AI tutor for 5-year-olds
description: Hey HN! We've spent the good part of this past year building an AI tutor that teaches kids ages 4-9 reading, math, ESL and more. Getting an AI tutor to effectively teach a child turns out to be a really hard technical challenge, this took getting the underlying architecture right. Our tutor steers the UX in real-time and makes complex decisions on the fly. Doing both at conversation speed required us to replace the standard tool-use loop. title: Launch HN: Context.dev (YC S26) – API to get structured data from any website
description: Hi Hacker News, I’m Yahia. I built Context.dev ( https://www.context.dev/ ) to make it really easy to integrate web data into your products and agents. Here’s a demo video: https://www.tella.tv/video/build-faster-with-context-dev-api... Since it’s an API, here are the docs: https://docs.context.dev/quickstart .
